question: Sugar and athletic performance
notes: Vocabulary-gap diagnostic. 10000167649 = the broadly-titled 'Specific Role for Sucrose' review (surfaces in v4 baseline). 41299202/41191077/41926079 = carb mouth rinse / glucose-fructose oxidation RCTs (specific vocab, absent from v4 top-50 per debug-sugar-perf.js). 10000158192/10004317414/10000748853/10000444142/39940403 = additional specific-vocab papers from the same diagnostic. must_exclude 10004375236 = 'Sugar and metabolic health' which is keyword-adjacent but off-topic for exercise performance. Recall@K measures how many of the 9 on-topic papers surface.

question: Creatine for strength training
notes: pmid 10000000009 = 'The Impact of Creatine Supplementation on Strength Training' — should remain in top-5 after v4 cutover.

question: Caffeine before resistance training
notes: pmid 10000153670 = 'Effect of caffeine ingestion on resistance training performance' — direct topic match.

question: Protein timing for muscle growth
notes: Recall passes if any of these pmids surface — they're duplicates of the same canonical Protein-timing meta-analysis indexed across PubMed + openalex. 23241341 = pubmed original, 10000292198 = openalex copy of same title.

notes: pmid 23765355 = 'Vitamin D supplementation in athletes.' — exact match.

notes: 10000143891 = 'Effect of Partial Sleep Deprivation on Strength'. 10000886434 = 'Implications of sleep loss or sleep deprivation on muscle strength' — equally on-topic systematic review.
